creator: herbert@gojira.at
text:
1. This panic happens since r272568:

Author: hrs
Date: Sun Oct  5 19:43:37 2014
New Revision: 272568                
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/base/272568
                                 
Log:
  Virtualize if_bridge(4) cloner.

Modified:
  head/sys/net/if_bridge.c

Maybe hrs@ can be added to/comment on this bug report?

2. On a recent kernel you can work around this bug by adding "device if_bridge" to your kernel
